name: Bottom Navigation
description: A sticky mobile navigation bar positioned at the bottom of the viewport.

guidelines.purpose: Bottom Navigation provides primary navigation links at the bottom of the mobile interface. It ensures accessibility to main sections through icons and labels, supporting active states and notification badges.

anatomy.container: ds-bottom-nav. Sticky position, var(--color-background-white) background, top border var(--color-background-tertiary).
anatomy.item: bnav-item. Centered flex container for icon and label.
anatomy.badge: Optional numerical badge (badge--small) at the top-right of the item.

state.active: Icon var(--color-content-key), active label class Applied.

specs.height: Optimized for mobile touch targets (approx calc(var(--sizing-100) * 18) total height including padding).
specs.spacing: Flex-around distribution for even item spacing.
